panel.save-first: Save the entry first to enable translation.
settings.title: LLM Translate
settings.description: Configure the LLM provider used to auto-translate content across every enabled locale.
settings.model-hint: Leave empty to use the default model for the selected provider.
settings.api-key-hint: Leave empty to keep the currently saved key.
settings.system-prompt-hint: Appended to every translation request, e.g. tone of voice or domain terms.
modal.title: Translate to all languages
modal.mode-hint: Fields already filled in on the target language are kept untouched unless you choose to overwrite everything.
